_comment: Source of truth for the app's feature inventory and its test coverage. Humans edit this when adding/removing a feature. CI (scripts/check-feature-manifest.mjs) fails when code drifts from this file (new/removed endpoints, components, or dead test references) and regenerates the auto block in docs/APP-STATE.md. Tiers follow risk-based testing: critical = smoke-gated on every PR; important = regression suite; nice = best-effort; internal = tooling, not user-facing.

tiers.critical: Core user journey. If it breaks the app is unusable. Must have a behavioral smoke test gated on every PR.
tiers.important: Real user value, frequent use. Must have regression coverage.
tiers.nice: Enhancement or easter egg. Best-effort coverage.
tiers.internal: Tooling / ops. Not part of the user-facing product.

coverageLegend.behavioral: A test actually executes the feature's logic and asserts real behavior.
coverageLegend.mocked: Tested through e2e/unit but the failure-prone layer is mocked away (e.g. silent audio).
coverageLegend.source-only: Only verified by grepping source text (makeover-*.test.js); regressions that keep the same tokens pass.
coverageLegend.device-only: Cannot run in Chromium-on-Linux CI; needs real Safari/iOS or a real device.

features.name: Poem display (Arabic + translation + transliteration)
features.userFacing: The poem renders with Arabic text, optional English translation and romanization, correct RTL and font.
features.gap: Arabic font rendering (Amiri/Tajawal) differs prod vs CI; no visual regression.

features.name: Discover / random poem
features.userFacing: Tap the fire icon, press right arrow, or Surprise Me to load a new poem.
features.gap: e2e routes /api/** to canned JSON; real server SERVING filters + exclude fallback only covered by server.test.js in isolation.

features.name: Same-poet carousel (swipe between poems)
features.userFacing: Swipe left/right to move between poems by the same poet; dots indicate position.
features.gap: carousel.spec skips silently when <2 dots populate; a broken carousel can pass as skipped.

features.name: Listen / TTS playback (play, pause, resume)
features.userFacing: Press Listen to hear the poem recited; pause/resume; space bar toggles.
features.gap: HIGHEST RISK. togglePlay.js (1025 lines, 105 branches) state machine is never executed behaviorally; makeover-tone asserts source text via regex; e2e runs on silent PCM with the streaming path aborted.

features.name: Stop audio on poem swipe (no background audio)
features.userFacing: Swiping to another poem stops any playing recitation.
features.gap: Regressed in #552 on streaming/iOS players (no .state). liveAudioStream covers the streaming stop primitive; the togglePlay swipe path is not behaviorally tested.

features.name: Voice cycle pill (change reciter voice)
features.userFacing: Tap the mic pill to cycle through 30 voices; restarts playback in the new voice if active.
features.gap: voices.test covers nextVoice + persistence; the abort+restart race on mid-recitation switch is untested.

features.name: Switch TTS engine mid-recitation (Live / REST / Pro)
features.userFacing: DebugPanel toggles engine; switching mid-recitation aborts cleanly and restarts.
features.gap: Source of #560/#558/#561. The orphaned-stream/abort path on engine switch has no behavioral test.

features.name: Word-by-word read-along highlight
features.userFacing: The currently spoken word highlights and auto-scrolls; snaps to last word on completion.
features.gap: Timing math and class transitions well covered. Auto-scroll layout (getBoundingClientRect) only real in Chromium, not jsdom.

features.name: Seek to previous/next verse
features.userFacing: Skip controls jump playback to the start of the prev/next verse.
features.gap: startPlayer is mocked; isSeeking singleton clearing not behaviorally verified.

features.name: iOS playback through hardware silent switch
features.userFacing: On iPhone, recitation plays even when the physical mute switch is on.
features.gap: navigator.audioSession + HTMLAudio unlock. Source of #556/#561. Impossible in CI; needs a manual iOS device checklist.

features.name: Audio prefetch + IndexedDB cache
features.userFacing: Adjacent poems' audio is pre-generated so Listen is instant on cache hit.
features.gap: cache.test covers Blob->ArrayBuffer (iOS #554). Prefetch is skipped entirely in live mode; the in-flight prefetch poll (60s nested timeouts) is untested.

features.name: AI insight / analysis (Explain)
features.userFacing: Tap the lightbulb to get translation, depth, and author insights streamed in.
features.gap: Parsing well covered. SSE streaming + swipe-bail (_analysisGeneration) only over mocked routes.

features.name: Save / unsave poems (Khazana)
features.userFacing: Heart a poem to save it; view saved poems in My Poems; pin, sort, bulk-remove.
features.gap: Supabase fully mocked. Optimistic insert + 23505 dedup + post-OAuth auto-save stash only logic-tested.

features.name: Sign in / out (Google + Apple OAuth)
features.userFacing: Sign in to sync saved poems and settings; app works fully without auth.
features.gap: Real OAuth redirect/PKCE exchange can't run in CI; only the stash/restore + short-circuit logic is mockable.

features.name: Settings persistence (theme, font, voice)
features.userFacing: Theme + font sync to your account when signed in; voice/TTS mode persist in localStorage.
features.gap: Debounced upsert to user_settings only logic-tested; voice_preference column exists but UI uses localStorage.

features.name: Text settings (font, size, highlight, background, parallax, sparkles)
features.userFacing: The Aa pill opens a popover to control typography, highlight style, background pattern, line color, parallax, gold sparkles.
features.gap: Store + highlight defaults covered; full popover interaction matrix not exhaustively e2e-tested.

features.name: Dark / light theme
features.userFacing: Sun/Moon toggles theme; resets to dark on reload unless signed in.
features.gap: None significant.

features.name: Share card (image generation, download, web share)
features.userFacing: Generate a poem image card in 5 designs; download or native-share it.
features.gap: canvas ctx mocked; real toDataURL pixels + navigator.share unavailable in CI; Arabic font rendering unverified.

features.name: Deep link to a poem (/poem/:id) + OG meta
features.userFacing: Opening /poem/:id loads that specific poem; social previews show the poem card.
features.gap: Param parsing covered; deep-link fetch-failure fallback to random only logic-level.

features.name: Copy poem to clipboard
features.userFacing: Copy button puts Arabic + English text on the clipboard.
features.gap: clipboard stubbed in unit setup; e2e asserts the success state.

features.name: Flag / downvote poem
features.userFacing: Thumbs-down flags a poem and auto-advances; toggles off on re-tap.
features.gap: Frontend uses Supabase-direct emitEvent; the Express event endpoints are an unused alternate path.

features.name: Poet filter / picker
features.userFacing: Pick a poet (featured or searched) to read only their poems.
features.gap: search endpoint exists server-side but has no client service wrapper; search UI path thin.

features.name: Splash / kinetic onboarding
features.userFacing: First visit shows a desert splash and a 3-phase kinetic walkthrough.
features.gap: No behavioral test of phase progression or hasSeenOnboarding gating.

features.name: Zen idle mode
features.userFacing: After 2s of inactivity the chrome fades, leaving poem + Aa + theme + floating Listen.
features.gap: No test for idle transition or that settings taps don't wake chrome.

features.name: Ratchet mode (Gen-Z slang insights)
features.userFacing: Long-press Discover or type 'yalla' to toggle slang-style insights + orange glow.
features.gap: Easter-egg toggles + RATCHET_SYSTEM_PROMPT path untested.

features.name: Keyboard shortcuts
features.userFacing: Space/arrows/E/T/R/Esc/? drive playback, discover, translation, help.
features.gap: Help overlay + a few shortcuts touched in e2e; full key matrix not asserted.

features.name: In-app bug report
features.userFacing: Debug panel submits a bug report that opens a GitHub issue.
features.gap: server.test covers the endpoint shape; the client submit flow is untested.

features.name: PWA install + offline caching
features.userFacing: Installable to home screen; works offline from cached assets and poems.
features.gap: pwa-service-worker.spec needs a prod preview build (skips on dev); SW lifecycle absent in jsdom.

features.name: New-release detection + stale-cache clear
features.userFacing: On a new deploy the app detects the version change, clears stale precache, and reloads.
features.gap: Source of #557. checkForNewRelease (fetch+compare+caches.delete+reload) is unit-testable with mocks but currently has NO unit test; iOS Safari SW unreliability is device-only.

features.name: Backend keep-alive (anti cold-start)
features.userFacing: Invisible: server self-pings to avoid Render cold starts.
features.gap: None.

features.name: AI mode (Gemini poem generation)
features.userFacing: Alternate source: poems generated by Gemini instead of the database.
features.gap: Model ranking + thinking config covered; live generation mocked.

features.name: Design-review tooling API
features.userFacing: Not user-facing. Backs the design-review agent workflow.
features.gap: Endpoints well covered against mocked pg.

features.name: Ambient visuals (Islamic geometric background, consultation effect)
features.userFacing: Squoctogon Islamic-geometry background; sparkle/ray effect while an insight is being consulted.
features.gap: Purely decorative; no behavioral coverage, low risk.

features.name: TTS lab (dev experiment page)
features.userFacing: Not user-facing. /tts-lab dev page for TTS experiments.
features.gap: Dev-only; no coverage needed.
